# openai_project_rate_limits (Data Source)

List project rate limits.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_project_rate_limits" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `rate_limits` (Attributes List) Project rate limits returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rate_limits))
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.

<a id="nestedatt--rate_limits"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rate_limits`

Read-Only:

- `batch_1_day_max_input_tokens` (Number) batch 1 day max input tokens
- `id` (String) id
- `max_audio_megabytes_per_1_minute` (Number) max audio megabytes per 1 minute
- `max_images_per_1_minute` (Number) max images per 1 minute
- `max_requests_per_1_day` (Number) max requests per 1 day
- `max_requests_per_1_minute` (Number) max requests per 1 minute
- `max_tokens_per_1_minute` (Number) max tokens per 1 minute
- `model` (String) model
